title: docs/backlog.md + items/ become CLI-owned (write-guard)

Extend the write-guard test suites with deny + allow cases, red-first. Regen manifest + ledger + registry.

truths: direct edit of generated index or an item file is denied naming the verb
CLI writes pass; migration script path documented as CLI-mediated
both twins identical; guard tests cover deny and allow
